parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1024, system: $env.WHATSAPP_BOT_SYSTEM_PROMPT, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.message_text }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $json.sender_phone, type: 'text', text: { body: $json.bot_response } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $env.OPERATOR_PHONE, type: 'text', text: { body: '📋 *Richiesta da gestire*

👤 ' + ($json.sender_name || $json.sender_phone) + '
📞 +' + $json.sender_phone + '
📂 ' + $json.category + '
⚡ ' + $json.priority + '
💬 ' + $json.message_text.substring(0, 300) + '

📝 ' + $json.summary } }) }}
